form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 7th on April 6 over 300m at this track behind Midweek Scotches beaten 10 lengths (18.23) in a Grade 5. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

form.formComment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when she finished last in a Mix 3/4 on March 21 over 300m at this track behind Tonka Turtle beaten 13 lengths (18.62). Happy to overlook recent efforts. Well placed and gets chance to find best.
